title: Emi's SMP Modpack
description: A performance-enhancing modpack with a plethora of fair-play QOL plugins, tailored for use on SMP servers.
body: A performance-enhancing modpack with a plethora of fair-play QOL plugins, tailored for use on SMP servers. The pack includes mods to enhance the audio, visuals, and gameplay of the base Minecraft game. The pack is made of Client-Side mods that can be used on any Minecraft server. The pack only contains mods that the creator belives to be fair for use on most SMP servers, but always check the rules of your server.
